name: Juice Shop — IDOR: basket retrievable by id without ownership check

provenance.note: Vulnerable side is verbatim-real Juice Shop master; safe baseline reconstructed (Juice Shop ships no in-repo fix). Challenge: View Basket.

notes: req.params.id is used directly in BasketModel.findOne({ where: { id } }) and the basket is returned via res.json with no ownership verification — any authenticated user can read another user's basket by guessing ids. Fix asserts the basket id matches the caller's own bid before querying.
